semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for validating ArchSpine's pre-commit hook configuration and resolution logic.
responsibilities: Tests the Config.getPreCommitResolution method for correct resolution values and sources.
Validates the Config.getHookSyncMode method returns expected sync mode.
Sets up isolated temporary directories for each test to avoid side effects.
Cleans up test artifacts after each test to maintain test isolation.
outOfScope: Production runtime logic for pre-commit hooks.
Direct modification of git hooks outside test isolation.
Configuration schema validation beyond unit test scope.
invariants: Must be a test file (imports vitest, uses describe/it).
Must isolate test environment using temporary directories.
Must clean up test artifacts after each test.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure pre-commit configuration resolution and hook sync mode behave correctly under various environment and config states.
